entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., a crop affected by aflatoxin contamination and the subject of resistance breeding

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: A fungal pathogen that causes aflatoxin contamination in groundnut

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: A quality and health problem caused by Aspergillus flavus that limits trade and consumption of groundnut

entities.name: IN-VITRO SEED COLONIZATION RESISTANCE
entities.description: A mechanism of aflatoxin resistance involving resistance to in-vitro seed colonization (IVSC)

entities.name: PRE-HARVEST AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION RESISTANCE
entities.description: A mechanism of aflatoxin resistance involving resistance to pre-harvest aflatoxin contamination (PAC)

entities.name: AFLATOXIN PRODUCTION RESISTANCE
entities.description: A mechanism of aflatoxin resistance involving resistance to aflatoxin production (AP)

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: An approach used to study differentially expressed genes associated with aflatoxin resistance mechanisms

entities.name: A. DURANENSIS
entities.description: The progenitor A subgenome of cultivated groundnut

entities.name: A. IPAENSIS
entities.description: The progenitor B subgenome of cultivated groundnut

entities.name: SENESCENCE ASSOCIATED PROTEINS
entities.description: Defense related genes differentially expressed in groundnut during fungal infection

entities.description: Defense related genes differentially expressed in groundnut during fungal infection

entities.description: Defense related genes (9s-LOX) differentially expressed in groundnut during fungal infection

entities.description: Defense related genes differentially expressed in groundnut during fungal infection

entities.description: Genes in Aspergillus flavus induced during compatible interaction with groundnut
